# Expected files after /browser-check runs
#
# NO PROJECT FILES. /browser-check is a local-browser smoke-test skill — it runs
# a Playwright harness against a local URL and reports to stdout. Temporary
# Playwright scripts live OUTSIDE the project (/tmp/itd-browser-check-*.js) and
# MUST NOT be committed.
#
# Presence of a committed Playwright smoke script or any modified source file in
# the output dir is a contract violation. Optional artifacts:
#   screenshots (desktop/mobile) — when visual evidence is useful (saved as
#                                  evidence, not committed source)
#   .rubric-status (update)      — browser evidence when deploy-readiness in scope
#
# /browser-check MUST NOT:
#   - Commit temporary Playwright scripts generated for smoke checks
#   - Make production-impacting changes from the browser check (route fixes
#     through /bugfix or the active execution node)
#   - Rely on screenshots alone when forms/navigation can be clicked
#   - Run headless unless requested or CI requires it
#
# /browser-check MAY:
#   - Detect dev servers: node $SKILL_DIR/playwright/run.js --detect
#   - Write a task-specific script OUTSIDE the project and run it via the harness
#   - Exercise the critical path (render, navigation, forms, loading/error)
#   - Capture desktop/mobile screenshots as evidence
#   - Print the output shape (BROWSER TARGET / ENGINE / FLOW CHECKED / RESULT /
#     EVIDENCE / SCREENSHOTS / CONSOLE OR NETWORK ISSUES / ISSUES / NEXT ACTION)
#
# A broken first render / blank app shell / unusable navigation / inaccessible
# primary flow => RESULT: BLOCKED before deploy.
#
# Validation deferred (status: pending) — same bucket as fixture-15-advisor
# (live dev server + Playwright + stdout). Manual verification via notes.md.
